title: sterculia africana var. socotrana
intro: Sterculia africana var. socotrana, also known as Socotra sterculia, is a plant species belonging to the family Sterculiaceae, native to the island of Socotra in Yemen. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Socotra sterculia include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Socotra sterculia typically involve the use of its leaves and roots, often in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
